title: Market synthesis deck from short news digest
prompt: Create a 7-slide market synthesis deck from this AI productivity news digest. Summarize the main shifts, what they imply for buyers, and how a vendor should respond.
targetAudience: Strategy, product marketing, and leadership teams
acceptanceNotes: The deck should synthesize across items instead of creating one slide per news bullet.
Implications should be business-relevant rather than generic AI commentary.
The response section should be prioritized, not a loose brainstorm.
